title: Find Two Factors
text: In the form $${ax}^2+bx+c$$, find $$2$$ numbers that multiply to c and add up to $$b$$ (Note: This only works when $$a=1)$$
pacedSpeech: In the form a x squared plus b x plus c find 2 numbers that multiply to c and add up to b(Note: This only works when a equals 1

title: Two Factors
text: The two factors that match these rules are $$5$$ and $$-6$$
pacedSpeech: The two factors that match these rules are 5 and minus 6

title: Plug into factored form
text: The factored form is $$\left(x+y\right) \left(x+z\right)$$. The value of $$x$$ can vary depending on the equation (could be u, $$y$$, f, etc) and the values of $$y$$ and $$z$$ are the two factored numbers.
pacedSpeech: The factored form is x plus y times x plus z The value of x can vary depending on the equation (could be u y f, etc) and the values of y and z are the two factored numbers
